violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the walls, floors, and racks in the walk-in cooler have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. These nonfood-contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The freezer door in the walk-in cooler was observed unable to shut entirely due to an excess build-up of ice within the door jamb and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to remove ice build-up from door jamb and repair or replace door gasket if necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
